full_prompt: Design a drop-in replacement mounting bracket for a US Army/Navy wheeled tactical vehicle auxiliary equipment mount, per a representative US government bracket-spares RFQ: deliver a machined 4130 normalized steel bracket meeting MIL-DTL-18326 fastener standards, DI-CMAN-80008B drawing package compliance, and a published static load rating of 2,500 lbf (11.1 kN) with SF 2.0 on yield and 2.5 on ultimate. Envelope: 160 x 100 x 50 mm. Interfaces: four through-holes for 3/8-16 UNC grade 5 bolts on a 100 x 60 mm rectangular pattern (mounts to frame rail); one accessory-side 5/8-18 UNF tapped hole 15 mm deep at the geometric center of the bracket body with engagement length >= 1.5D. Material: AISI 4130 normalized steel per AMS 6345 (yield 460 MPa, UTS 670 MPa, Young's modulus 205 GPa, density 7850 kg/m^3, elongation 21%); surface finish Ra <= 3.2 um; cadmium plating per AMS-QQ-P-416 Type II Class 2 (or equivalent zinc-nickel for RoHS compliance). Load cases: LC1 rated static pull 11,125 N along the 5/8-18 accessory stud axis (most common dynamometer rating test); LC2 rated vertical 11,125 N; LC3 combined 45-degree off-axis at rated magnitude; LC4 10 g bump-load (vehicle-class, per MIL-STD-810H Method 514.8 Procedure I ground vehicle) applied as multi-axis 10 g each axis simultaneously on the accessory lumped mass of 10 kg = 981 N per axis; LC5 salt-fog + cathodic protection durability per ASTM B117 (tracked as a pass/fail on coating continuity, not FEA). Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises under LC1, LC2, LC3 <= 460 / 2.0 = 230 MPa (SF 2.0 on yield for ground-vehicle secondary structure); (R2) max von Mises <= 670 / 2.5 = 268 MPa (SF 2.5 on ultimate); binding is R1 at 230 MPa; (R3) max von Mises under LC4 shock <= 460 / 1.5 = 307 MPa (relaxed SF 1.5 on yield for shock-transient, per MIL-HDBK-304C or equivalent); (R4) bracket mass <= 600 g; (R5) coating thickness 7.5-15 um cadmium plate per AMS-QQ-P-416; (R6) tapped hole 5/8-18 UNF engagement length >= 15 mm (1.5D) with class 2B thread fit. Deliverables: DI-CMAN-80008B compatible drawing pack (STEP AP242 + PDF 2D drawing + bill of materials); FEA report with per-case max stress; coating specification sheet referencing AMS-QQ-P-416; material certification traceability.
short_prompt:
Design a drop-in replacement mounting bracket for a US Army/Navy wheeled tactical vehicle auxiliary equipment mount per a representative US government bracket-spares RFQ: a machined AISI 4130 normalized steel bracket meeting MIL-DTL-18326 fastener standards, DI-CMAN-80008B drawing-package compliance, and a static load rating of 2,500 lbf (11.1 kN) with SF 2.0 on yield and 2.5 on ultimate.

Envelope: 160 x 100 x 50 mm. Interfaces: four through-holes for 3/8-16 UNC grade 5 bolts on 100 x 60 mm (frame rail); one central 5/8-18 UNF tapped hole 15 mm deep with engagement >= 1.5D.

Material: AISI 4130 normalized per AMS 6345; surface finish Ra <= 3.2 um; cadmium plating per AMS-QQ-P-416 Type II Class 2 (or RoHS Zn-Ni equivalent), thickness 7.5-15 um.

Load cases.
- LC1 rated static pull 11,125 N along the 5/8-18 accessory stud axis.
- LC2 rated vertical 11,125 N.
- LC3 combined 45-degree off-axis at rated magnitude.
- LC4 10 g bump load per MIL-STD-810H Method 514.8 Procedure I, applied as multi-axis 10 g on a 10 kg accessory mass = 981 N per axis.
- LC5 salt-fog + cathodic protection durability per ASTM B117 (pass/fail on coating continuity, not FEA).

Shock LC4 uses relaxed SF 1.5 on yield (per MIL-HDBK-304C or equivalent). Mass <= 600 g.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: DI-CMAN-80008B drawing format is a documentation deliverable, not FEA.
AMS-QQ-P-416 coating control is a process spec, not simulation.

prompt.title: 4130 normalized steel auxiliary equipment bracket, 2,500 lbf rated (US government RFQ template)
prompt.brief: Design a cadmium-plated 4130 normalized replacement bracket for a tactical vehicle auxiliary mount, 2,500 lbf rated with SF 2.0/2.5 per MIL-DTL-18326.

material.name: AISI 4130 normalized per AMS 6345
material.coating: AMS-QQ-P-416 Type II Class 2 cadmium 7.5-15 um

requirements.governing_standard: MIL-DTL-18326 + DI-CMAN-80008B + AMS 6345 + AMS-QQ-P-416 + ASTM B117

analysis_types: linear static x3 rated + shock transient or equivalent

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Not required by MIL-STD-810H Procedure I for this class.

notes.numeric_source: Representative US government bracket RFQ pattern; 2,500 lbf rating and 4130 normalized + cadmium plating are standard ground-vehicle spare bracket practice. Exact RFQ number not pinned; values are typical.
